description_long: This is a large, rectangular, military-style metal toolbox with a hinged lid that opens upward. The exterior is finished in a matte dark green color, with visible wear and scuff marks suggesting heavy use. The front face features two prominent metal latches for securing the lid, as well as several stickers and labels, including hazard and identification symbols. The sides and back are reinforced with embossed X-patterns for structural strength, and the box sits atop another identical closed toolbox, indicating stackability. The interior is a single, spacious compartment without visible trays or dividers, suitable for storing large tools or equipment. The overall design is utilitarian, robust, and intended for demanding urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, rugged, dark green metal toolbox with a hinged lid, front latches, and external labels, designed for heavy-duty urban or industrial use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, two metal latches, and multiple stickers and labels on the front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the X-pattern reinforcement on the side and the open lid, with no visible handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the open lid and additional stickers, with the X-pattern reinforcement visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the X-pattern reinforcement and open lid, similar to view 1 but mirrored.
attribute_handle_type: No visible external carrying handles; movement likely relies on gripping the box edges or latches.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two front-facing metal clasp latches, likely steel, with a simple flip-up mechanism; no keyholes or combination locks visible.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment with no visible trays, dividers, or removable bins; exterior shows no additional compartments.
attribute_external_labeling: Front: rectangular red and white warning label, rectangular white and black label, green and white label with pictogram
Rear: red and white label, green and white label
